underlying_goal: Compare fork repo against upstream to identify new features worth merging, and produce a full report on merge impact
friction_detail: Claude initially attributed the user's own features to upstream, couldn't identify the 'insight' feature the user described, and sub-agents had permission issues causing delays.
brief_summary: User wanted a thorough comparison of their fork vs upstream with a merge impact report; Claude misattributed features initially and struggled to find the insight feature, but eventually gathered research via parallel agents before the session ended incomplete.
